name: Where's Your Country?
author: Poki
description: Put your geography skills to the test in Where's Your Country! In this topology quiz game, you'll have to find the right country and click on it. Find all countries before the time runs out and win! Besides the full world, you can do continent-specific challenges as well! There's map for Europe, North-America, South-America, Asia, Africa and Oceania. There's also Super Hard modes - for those who really know their maps! Don't worry if you get stuck, you can always ask for a helpful hint. Can you figure out where all the countries are? How to play Where's Your Country? Use the mouse to click the countries! Who created Where's Your Country? Where's Your Country was created by Eidosk. Play their other games on Poki: ArithmeticA , Fast Typer and Fast Typer 2 How can I play Where's Your Country for free? You can play Where's Your Country for free on Poki.
